messages.content: Translate the text into English: Hola Leila, muchas gracias por escribirme, me alegra mucho que te guste mi trabajo 🤲🏼 Me encantaría probar los productos y por supuesto hacer las reseñas, te voy a compartir mi whatsapp para que sea más fácil comunicarnos <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PHONE_NUMBER>

Hello Leila, thank you very much for writing to me, I am very happy that you like my work 🤲🏼 I would love to try the products and of course write reviews. I will share my WhatsApp with you so that it is easier to communicate <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PHONE_NUMBER>.
translate the text into Chinese: Could you maybe send me the cheapest product you have and maybe even a cash reward, what do you think?
你可以给我寄最便宜的产品吗？或者甚至提供现金奖励？你觉得呢？
Identify the language and translate to English: A quanti capita

Language: Italian

Translation: To how many people does it concern?
Identify the language and translate to English: Todos sobre Hardware de PC's

Language: Spanish

Translation: All about PC hardware.
Translate the text to Spanish: Where should I ship to?
¿A dónde debo enviarlo?
translate to English: De este si me encantaría que fuera el de 2Tb para hacer test de velocidad y otras pruebas para algunos videos…
"I would love for this one to be the 2TB one in order to run speed tests and other tests for certain videos."
Translate the text to Spanish: I'll confirm the stock first?
¿Confirmo primero el inventario?
Translate the text to Spanish: I’ll confirm the stock first.
Confirmaré primero el inventario.

translate to English: ¡Cuidado con tu Memoria RAM! 😥😅
Mira el video hasta el final.

Be careful with your RAM Memory! 😥😅
Watch the video until the end.
Translate the text to Spanish: Perfect! I'll arrange the shipment.
¡Perfecto! Voy a arreglar el envío.
translate to English: Por último, no había visto que hay versión DDR5 esas me interesarían mucho, si se puede obviamente
"Finally, I hadn't seen that there's a DDR5 version, which would interest me a lot if possible."
